# Pull Request

## What does this change?

A clear description of what this PR does. One or two sentences.

## Why?

What problem does it solve, or what capability does it add?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Jurisdiction module (new or updated)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Code follows existing patterns (read the relevant files before writing)
- [ ] No personal paths, local environment references, or hardcoded credentials in the diff
- [ ] If this changes a jurisdiction module: FOI citation sources are included in the PR description
- [ ] If this changes the credential system: the civic action represented by the new credential is explained
- [ ] If this adds a UI feature: it has been considered through the Illich test (does it build capacity or dependency?)

## The Illich Test

Does this change make citizens more capable without the tool?

If yes, briefly explain how. If you're unsure, say so — that's worth discussing in review.

## Screenshots (if UI change)

## Additional context
